extraction.one_line_summary: ALAPHILIPPE won from 21-rider breakaway at Xorret de Catí, patiently wearing down MAJKA before sprinting; FROOME attacked mid-climb gaining 15s on rivals except CONTADOR.
tactical_patterns: BORA positioned MAJKA in 21-rider break for steep finish (20% sectors) but failed when outmaneuvered tactically by ALAPHILIPPE.
FROOME attacked mid-climb on Xorret de Catí, gaining time on all GC rivals except CONTADOR who clawed back on descent.
OLIVEIRA secured virtual red jersey by infiltrating break at km 67 when 5min clear, showing Movistar's preventative tactics.
CONTADOR's descent attack in final 2km recovered FROOME's mid-climb gap, exploiting technical skills over climbing deficit.

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: Patiently countered MAJKA's repeated attacks before outsprinting him, showing tactical maturity beyond pure punching power on 20% slopes.
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: Mid-climb attack isolated all GC rivals except CONTADOR, extending overall lead to 28 seconds despite late concession.
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: positive: Only GC contender to match FROOME, using descending prowess to nullify climbing gap in final 2km after difficult early Vuelta.
rider_signals.MAJKA Rafał: negative: Despite BORA's teamwork to deliver him on steep finish, tactically outmaneuvered by ALAPHILIPPE who neutralized repeated attacks.
rider_signals.OLIVEIRA Nelson: positive: Infiltrated 21-rider break to virtually take red jersey, demonstrating Movistar's strategic jersey hunting beyond GC focus.
